whenToUse.summary: A deeply discounted front-end offer used to acquire new customers (the Groupon/LivingSocial model). The thank-you page encourages buyers to SHARE the same deal with their network, creating built-in viral distribution. Use when the goal is fast customer acquisition + organic spread from an irresistible, time-boxed discount.
goals: Acquire many new customers fast with a deep discount
Move excess inventory or fill capacity (local service)
Seed a buyer list cheaply with urgency
signals: Offer is a steep/limited-time discount, not a free sample
Goal includes sharing / referral / viral spread
Time-boxed urgency is core to the pitch
Local service or product with capacity to fill
antiSignals: Long convincing required -> VSL or Sales Letter Funnel

pageStructure.purpose: Present one irresistible, deeply discounted, time-boxed deal and convert fast on a simple order form.
keyElements: Deal headline with the discount/savings framed (was/now price)
Single hero offer + benefit bullets (short copy)
Trust badges + a couple of testimonials
widgets: Custom HTML/JS countdown timer in code block

pageStructure.purpose: Confirm the purchase and immediately incentivize the buyer to SHARE the same deal with their network via pre-filled referral links and share buttons (viral loop).
keyElements: 'Share this deal with friends' incentive (unlock bonus / give-a-discount)
Pre-filled referral / share links (Facebook, X, WhatsApp, email, copy-link)
widgets: Custom HTML social-share buttons + pre-filled referral links

primaryPersona.script: Urgency + scarcity + deadline formulas; deep-discount/value-framing; short punchy benefit copy
primaryPersona.role: Writes the high-urgency deal copy and the share-to-unlock incentive copy

salesScript.why: A daily deal needs a fast hook and a tight offer; the story is minimal and the urgency does the closing.

supportingPersonas.role: Frames the deal hook and the why-this-is-special angle
Keeps the discount on-brand so it builds equity rather than cheapening the brand

supportingPersonas.script: SB7 Call-to-Action / invite-others framing on the share page
supportingPersonas.role: Writes the share/referral CTA so the buyer becomes a guide inviting friends

copyFramework.notes: Copywriting Secrets drives the urgency/scarcity deal copy; Lead Funnels supplies the compressed Hook/Story/Offer; Brand Mapping keeps the discount on-brand; StoryBrand writes the share-the-deal CTA. Keep everything short — urgency and the deal do the selling.

skill6Steps: Create Funnel -> name with client prefix -> Create
Add New Step 1 = 'Deal Order Page' (countdown timer via custom HTML/JS in code block)
Add New Step 2 = 'Social Share Thank-You Page' (share buttons + pre-filled referral links)
products: Discounted deal product in GHL Payments
ghlBuild.notes: The countdown timer and social-share/referral buttons are custom HTML/JS in the code-block element; build heavier versions in Vercel and embed. Pre-build the order form, tags, and referral tracking via Skill 44 (or GHL MCP/API). The viral loop lives on the thank-you page: pre-fill the share links with the buyer's personal referral code.
